first_run.rationale: The scores are identical (2/10), and the reasoning across both evaluations is substantively the same. Both evaluations correctly identify the candidate as a skilled individual contributor who lacks the executive leadership, team scaling, and specific domain depth required for the CTO role. The minor differences in phrasing are consistent with normal run-to-run variation and do not introduce any new logic or concerns tied to the change in location from Germany to Romania.
